blocks.text: Giving the agent eyes into the running app

Extract text & element snapshots
Interact with components by ref
Restart services locally
High-level "Open settings menu"

Screenshots - page or component
Trace DOM -> Svelte components
Extract logs - backend, helper, FE
"Change feature flag": "Seed DB"
But the point is not our tools, it's yours
Make tools to interact with your product specific to your product.
